title: AI-Powered Threat Hunter
description: MDR-as-a-Service with AI: 24/7 SOC analysts augmented by LLM intent-classifier, MITRE ATT&CK correlation, automated response playbooks, 15-min neutralisation SLA, monthly threat-intel executive report.
features: 24/7 SOC team augmented by LLM threat-intent classifier
MITRE ATT&CK ATT&CK correlation and Kill-Chain (TTP-level) mapping
Automated response playbook — detection to containment in under 15 minutes
Monthly threat-intelligence executive report for the board with risk trend
benefits: Enterprise-grade protection at 67% of the cost of a 3-person in-house SOC
Detect and contain threats 15 minutes from detection to neutralisation
LLM-intent classifier finds zero-day TTPs that rule engines miss
Monthly executive report means you know your true security posture without reading analyst logs

title: API Security Gateway
description: API attack protection: real-time schema-drift detection using learning-baseline, anomaly scoring against OpenAPI spec, abuse/price-scraping/bot-detection per endpoint, auto-block/auto-remediate per OWASP API top-10.
features: Real-time schema drift detection against auto-generated metadata baseline
Anomaly scoring per endpoint using learning-baseline per consumer id
Abuse, price-scraping, and bot-detection with geo + device fingerprinting
Auto-block and auto-remediate per OWASP API Top-10 rule
benefits: Credential stuffing and account-takeover APIs blocked before they hit backends
Dynamic schema drift means zero false-positives on normal API versioning
Abuse/price-scraping detection recovers $100K+ in lost revenue per year
API blocked within 500ms — faster than any adversary tool can script

title: Cloud Zero Trust Access (ZTNA)
description: Zero trust network access for cloud and on-prem resources: per-application least-privilege policy, device posture context, 1-click revoke per identity, 75% faster access time for legitimate users, full session recording.
features: Per-application least-privilege access policy from identity to cookie
Device posture context — certificate validity, OS, browser assessment before granting
1-click kill/revoke per user identity across all resources
Full session recording with playable video replay per access session
benefits: Users blessedly fast SSH and HTTPS access without tear-down VPN
1-click revocation keeps compromised identity blast-radius strictly bounded
Privileged access introduced with per-session fine-grained token and audit trail
Access offboarded exactly when employee leaves — zero lingering shadow-permissions

title: Browser Isolation Platform
description: Remote browser isolation: inspect every uncertified or risky site in cloud sandbox, drive-by download protection, credential-forwarding safe mock environment, phishing-engine sandbox analysis, bandwidth savings 30+.
features: Remote browser isolation — all rendering occurs off-device in a cloud sandbox
Drive-by download protection — adware aphishing payloads isolated from endpoint
Credential-forwarding sandbox — test credentials safely no overposting to real accounts
Phishing engine sandbox analysis — 30-day credential-reuse window check in isolated browser
benefits: Zero malware reaches endpoint from the unclassified internet
Phishing credential reuse checks take 5 minutes not 5 days
Bandwidth savings of over 30% vs. full browser VDI
IT picks up no new virus protection costs on client OS

title: Privacy Enhancing Tech (PET) Platform
description: PET middleware for regulated industries: on-the-fly tokenisation of PII, homomorphic-encryption-ready operator, output differential-privacy noise injection, audit log with deterministic proofs, FIPS 140-2 validated.
features: On-the-fly PII tokenisation — column and field-level granularity with deterministic mapping
Homomorphic-encryption-ready operator — compute on encrypted fields without decryption
Output differential-privacy noise injection — per-query budgetable budget
Audit log with immutable Merkle-tree proof per transformation event in log
benefits: Meets GDPR Art. 25 / HIPAA / PCI-DSS without rip-and-replace
On-the-fly tokenisation means zero raw-PII exposure in analytics pipelines
Homomorphic compute on encrypted fields makes privacy preserve-compute finally practical
Deterministic audit log with Merkle proofs satisfies even the strictest regulator audits

title: SBOM & Supply Chain Security
description: Supply chain security platform: SBOM & VEX generation (every build/build event), CVE SLSA provenance score, dependency-graph diff for every PR, SLSA Level 3 attestation, reproducible-build verification.
features: SBOM + VEX generated per build with CycloneDX + SPDX dual-format
CVE + SLSA provenance score every build — compare across time and distributors
Dependency-graph diff per PR — highlight transitive dependency changes before merge
SSL SA L3 attestation with reproducible-build verification per environment
benefits: Meet US Executive Order 14028 requirements with zero manual SBOM work
PR-level dependency-diff halted before merge for transitive dependency changes
Provenance scoring means you know what source you trust and what to question
Regulatory audit readiness — attestation and SBOM already on-demand
